title: The Legend of Zelda: Link's Awakening
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Action-Adventure game.

A small child-sized adventurer seen from behind on the left foreground with a short sword at their side in a calm island shoreline looking across open water toward a single steep mountain island placed on the right side, with a smooth egg-shaped shrine integrated at its summit, standing still after reaching the shore, facing the distant island in sea wind.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- Game Boy aesthetic, green monochrome palette, crisp pixel forms, portable mood, and very clean value separation
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- lonely, dreamlike, adventurous

Composition:
- small child-sized figure anchored in the lower-left foreground, broad reflective water across the center, one dominant mountain island on the right third, a clear egg-shaped summit, simple clouds, screen-like framing, and strong negative space
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Important - do NOT include: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Link likeness, avoid exact island mountain shapes from official art, avoid official shield and hat details, avoid title-screen text or logos, avoid exact Wind Fish egg iconography, avoid resemblance to link, avoid resemblance to zelda. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no recognizable IP.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Link likeness, avoid exact island mountain shapes from official art, avoid official shield and hat details, avoid title-screen text or logos, avoid exact Wind Fish egg iconography, avoid resemblance to link, avoid resemblance to zelda
revised_prompt: Picture a retro-styled illustration inspired by classic action-adventure games. Imagine a child-sized adventurer, seen from the rear, standing on the left foreground of a serene island shoreline. The adventurer is equipped with a diminutive sword at their side. Their gaze is locked onto the far distance, where a steep mountainous island rests, with a uniquely smooth egg-shaped shrine crowning its peak. The style to follow retains the charm of the Game Boy era, featuring a green monochrome palette with sharp pixel forms, creating a portable and clean feel. The mood it sets harks back to the entwining sentiment of solitude, enchantment, and the spirit of adventure. The composition keeps the figure in the lower-left foreground with the reflective water extending across the middle, rendering a panoramic scene. The solitary mountain island occupies the right third, capped by the enigmatic egg-shaped summit. The scene should convey high clarity, strong contrast, and minimal visual noise, sans any text or watermark. Important to avoid inclusion of any specific game character, logo, costume or weapon design, while the overall illustration maintains a distinct likeness to the game genre's atmosphere.
